objective: Implement Tech Stack, About, and Team sections with specific animations and minimalist design.

phases.name: Preparation
steps: Create directory structure for About and Team components

phases.name: Tech Stack Section
steps: Create techStack.data.ts with technology list and colors
Create TechStackSection.tsx with infinite loop animation
Implement circular icon containers and glow effects

phases.name: Team Section
steps: Implement social icons with hover glow effects (GitHub, LinkedIn, Mail)
Create TeamSection.tsx to layout cards in a grid

phases.name: Integration & Verification
steps: Integrate sections into main application page
Capture screenshots and GIFs for artifacts
